title: Amazon’s chief global affairs officer calls on Brussels to end VAT rules that disadvantage EU sellers [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: David Zapolsky, Amazon’s Chief Global Affairs and Legal Officer, tells Euractiv that a simple regulatory fix could help close a fraud gap costing the bloc over €100bn
summary_public: David Zapolsky, Amazon’s Chief Global Affairs and Legal Officer, tells Euractiv that a simple regulatory fix could help close a fraud gap costing the bloc over €100bn

BE.label: positive
BE.evidence: end VAT rules that disadvantage EU sellers
